hypothesis: Systems-optimizer recovery becomes more deterministic if every active or seeded slice must mirror the exact seeded hypothesis-card `recorded_at`, so backlog or state cannot silently retimestamp a replayable control-plane ratchet before activation or resume.
measurement: Before the ratchet, `node CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` required seeded hypothesis cards to carry `recorded_at`, but it did not require the matching seeded backlog item or non-null `state.active_hypothesis` to mirror that timestamp. A synchronized falsification could therefore rewrite a seeded backlog item or active hypothesis with a different `recorded_at` than `CLAW/control-plane/system-optimizer/hypotheses/<id>.json` and still verify clean, even though recovery would now disagree on when the replayable slice was actually seeded. After the ratchet, the verifier rejects any seeded backlog item or active hypothesis whose `recorded_at` is missing, non-UTC, or different from its seeded hypothesis card, and the fixed scope-local promotion bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if seeded systems-optimizer backlog items and any non-null active_hypothesis must mirror the exact seeded hypothesis-card `recorded_at`, and the fixed scope-local evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Seeded systems-optimizer slices need one exact UTC `recorded_at` shared across backlog, active state, and hypothesis card artifacts; otherwise queued or resumed recovery can silently retimestamp the same replayable ratchet.
